msg: Control flow of non-void function ends here!
reasoning: The tool reports 'Control flow of non-void function ends here!' at line 18-20 for the main() function, under presence condition def(CONFIG_CRYPTO_TEST). Two problems: (1) In C99+, main() implicitly returns 0 when control falls off the end — this is not a bug. (2) The missing return in main is unconditional (present in all configurations, not just when CONFIG_CRYPTO_TEST is defined), so the presence condition is also wrong. The real vbdb bug (242f1a3) is an UndefinedSymbol: test_cipher() calls crypto_alloc_ablkcipher() which is only defined under CONFIG_CRYPTO_BLKCIPHER. False positive.
